**Ngl guys, I have to give this a solid 10/10. **

This worked flawlessly. I use both Evadus+ on SEB and Evadus Lite for online quizzes. I honestly have to appreciate how much work has been put into this for it to be as stealthy and seamless as possible. Everything from it not being seen when you take screenshots or screen record to the fact that on Task Manager, its a background task running instead of an app, which makes it even more hidden, not to mention it being named a system process. Theres also a ton of shortcut options which you can adjust to your liking and optimise the workflow. Clearly, the creator has put a lot of thought into this, and he takes the time to listen to ur concerns on discord and implement them as soon as possible. Always there to help and responds really quickly. 

I can only say nice things about this application and its creator. I’d recommend.
